name: Sanlo
description: Multi-platform payments and monetization for games with plug-and-play D2C webshops plus fintech/growth capital.

seo.title: Sanlo — In-app Purchase Optimization
seo.meta_description: Sanlo: Multi-platform payments and monetization for games with plug-and-play D2C webshops plus fintech/growth capital.

when_to_use: D2C web shop for games bypassing Apple/Google 30% fee
Multi-platform IAP management for mobile and PC games
Growth capital tied to game revenue analytics

pros: Bundles D2C webshops with growth capital
Plug-and-play setup targets indie and mid-size studios
Payments outside app stores capture more margin
Financing ties to real revenue data
cons: Mixing fintech and commerce can confuse buyers
Capital terms vary and may be costly
Webshop depth vs Xsolla and Stash to validate
Narrow to games, not general subscription apps
review.verdict: Interesting combo of webshop and financing for game studios, but evaluate each half against specialists separately.
review.best_for: Mobile game studios wanting a D2C webshop plus growth capital.
review.not_for: Non-game apps or studios that already have banking and commerce.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
